article_title: EF Core Interceptors 完全指南：审计字段、软删除和慢查询日志
core_theme: EF Core 10 的 7 种 Interceptor：SaveChangesInterceptor 做审计字段和软删除，DbCommandInterceptor 做慢查询日志
reader_takeaway: 学会用 Interceptor 自动处理审计字段、软删除和慢查询捕获，理解作用域服务注入的正确方式
summary_angle: 从手动在每个 Handler 里写审计字段 → 一个 Interceptor 自动处理所有 SaveChanges 的审计、软删除和慢查询

information_blocks.source_anchor: 原文开头——每个 Handler 手动设置 CreatedAt 重复且容易遗漏
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧：散落的实体对象，各自缺少 CreatedAt/UpdatedAt 标记

information_blocks.source_anchor: SaveChangesInterceptor 自动在 SaveChanges 前填充审计字段并执行软删除
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中心：一个拦截器层在 SaveChanges 之前检查所有实体变更并自动填入字段

information_blocks.source_anchor: DbCommandInterceptor 做慢查询日志 + 最终效果：审计字段自动完整
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧：数据库实体整齐排列，审计字段和软删除标志完整，慢查询被标记

main_metaphor: 一个拦截层/滤网在数据库操作之前自动检查和修补实体
primary_subject: 一条从左到右的数据管线：左侧散落实体 → 中心拦截器层进行自动修补 → 右侧整齐完整实体流入数据库
subject_action: 实体对象从左向右流动，经过中间拦截器层时被自动标记和修复
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: black-and-white printmaking look, carved textures, bold shadows, high contrast, poster-like but no title text
selected_style_reason: 用户未指定风格，本篇从风格池随机选中；黑白版画的反差和结构性适合表达拦截器层的中间过滤角色
style_safety_note: 清单风格为泛类型描述，不涉及品牌、工作室或艺术家复刻
draft_goal: 验证从散乱到拦截再到完整的三个信息块是否可辨认
revision_targets: 拦截层不够突出时强化
标签太小或模糊时放大
final_prompt:
Use case: infographic-story
Asset type: wide cover infographic illustration for a Chinese tech blog article
Primary request: Create a wide infographic-story cover illustration. Theme: EF Core 10 interceptors as middleware for database calls - auto audit fields, soft deletes, slow query logging.

Summary angle: From scattered entities missing audit fields → interceptor layer auto-stamps audit fields and soft deletes → clean entities with complete audit trails flowing into database.
Narrative flow: 3-beat process. 2.35:1 wide frame.
Information blocks:
- Problem (left): scattered entity objects missing CreatedAt/UpdatedAt markers — label '手动散乱'
- Mechanism (center): interceptor layer sitting before SaveChanges, inspecting and fixing all entity changes — label '拦截自动', fact '7 种'
- Takeaway (right): clean entities with complete audit fields and soft-delete flags flowing into database — label '审计完整', fact '>500ms'

Main metaphor: A data pipeline with an interceptor filter layer that inspects and repairs entities before they reach the database.
Subject: Entity objects flowing left to right through an interceptor filter stage. Left: scattered incomplete entities. Center: filter/detection layer applying stamps. Right: clean complete entities entering database.
Composition: Left-to-right horizontal progression.
Style: combine editorial technical illustration with selected visual style descriptor: black-and-white printmaking look, carved textures, bold shadows, high contrast, poster-like but no title text. Stylized, editorial, visually strong. Do not imitate a specific brand, studio, or living artist.
Color palette: black, white, warm paper off-white.
Visible text: only 3 Chinese labels: '手动散乱', '拦截自动', '审计完整'. No poster title, no long sentences, no English slogans.
Constraints: no watermark, no screenshots, no dashboards, no fake database UIs, no fake terminals, no fabricated metrics.
Avoid: code rain, neon lights, fake code editors, fake UI panels, decorative clutter, cyberpunk coloring.
